0.q: Accumulation of putrescine was in accordance with induction of ADC activity and expression of the apple ADC gene (MdADC).

1.q: salt stress impaired callus growth and increased cell injury, coupled with a conspicuous increase in putrescine content through the induction of MdADC expression and ADC activity.

2.q: ODC activity showed a pattern opposite to that of ADC in these conditions.

3.q: Accumulation of putrescine was in accordance with induction of ADC activity and expression of the apple ADC gene (MdADC).
